ddls:
CREATE TABLE "product_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the product category (e.g., Shirts, Jackets) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product category */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the category was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the category */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the category is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sizes" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size */,
  "size_name" TEXT /* Name of the size (e.g., S, M, L, XL, 2XL, 3XL) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the size */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the size was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the size */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the size is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_specifications" (
  "spec_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size specification */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product category */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size */,
  "front_length" REAL /* Front length of the clothing in inches */,
  "back_length" REAL /* Back length of the clothing in inches */,
  "chest" REAL /* Chest measurement of the clothing in inches */,
  "height_range" TEXT /* Height range for the size in inches */,
  "sleeve_length" REAL /* Sleeve length of the clothing in inches */,
  "shoulder_width" REAL /* Shoulder width of the clothing in inches */,
  "waist" REAL /* Waist measurement of the clothing in inches */,
  "hip" REAL /* Hip measurement of the clothing in inches */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the size specification was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the size specification */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the size specification is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("spec_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_specifications_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES product_categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_specifications_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to the product image */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the product was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the product */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the product is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES product_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_sizes" (
  "product_size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product size */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size */,
  "stock_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product size in stock */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the product size was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the product size */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the product size is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_sizes_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_sizes_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., customer, admin, staff) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the user */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the user is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_profiles" (
  "profile_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user profile */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the user in inches */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the user in pounds */,
  "chest" REAL /* Chest measurement of the user in inches */,
  "waist" REAL /* Waist measurement of the user in inches */,
  "hip" REAL /* Hip measurement of the user in inches */,
  "shoulder_width" REAL /* Shoulder width of the user in inches */,
  "sleeve_length" REAL /* Sleeve length of the user in inches */,
  "preferred_size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the preferred size */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the user profile was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the user profile */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("profile_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_profiles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_profiles_preferred_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("preferred_size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_recommendations" (
  "recommendation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size recommendation */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product */,
  "recommended_size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the recommended size */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the size recommendation was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the size recommendation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recommendation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_recommendations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_recommendations_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_recommendations_recommended_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("recommended_size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the product or size specification */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product or size specification being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the product or size specification was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, search) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the product or size specification */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's browser */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)
